_comment: Working base = complete true-stock Impulse 9.1.0 (Shopify CLI pull, rev 40d0dcd). owner: custom = ported Kansawala section, stock = untouched Impulse. No custom sections are present yet — the homepage migration is pending (see pending_migration below and docs/). Check this manifest, not filenames, to tell stock vs custom.

collection-grid-2.note: Duplicate of stock sections/featured-collections.liquid renamed "Collection Grid 2". Added three fields ported from the custom collections-grid section: Eyebrow + Heading italic line (section settings) and Metal label (per-block setting). Renders cards via the custom snippet collection-grid-item-2 instead of the shared stock snippet. A scoped {% style %} block restyles it to match the original collections-grid design (gold dashed eyebrow/metal label, brown heading with gold italic line, square cards) with colors hardcoded; stock files untouched.

collection-grid-item-2.note: Copy of stock snippets/collection-grid-item.liquid with a Metal label (block.settings.metal) rendered above the title. Used only by collection-grid-2; stock snippet left untouched.
